displayName: Context Graph Next: Workflow Wiring, Visualization, Context Optimization

decisions.decision: Auto-populate plan files[] from graph-suggest-scope results
decisions.rationale: Currently advisory-only; auto-populating reduces manual effort in /plan and ensures graph knowledge feeds directly into task scoping

decisions.decision: Test coverage mapping via CALLS edges
decisions.rationale: Map test functions to production code they call. Surface 'untested callers' as warnings during /review to improve test confidence

decisions.decision: API contract break detection on signature changes
decisions.rationale: When a function signature changes, flag all callers that may break. Integrates into /review blast-radius analysis

decisions.decision: Support both Mermaid and DOT/Graphviz output formats
decisions.rationale: Mermaid for inline markdown/GitHub rendering, DOT for deep analysis with graphviz. Select via --format flag

decisions.decision: Use graph proximity to prioritize files for Claude's context window
decisions.rationale: Instead of reading unrelated files, use call/import distance from the focal point to rank which files are most relevant

decisions.decision: Split test_context_graph.py as part of this feature
decisions.rationale: File at 1026 lines (max 800 invariant). Split into logical test modules to clear the warning

constraints: Python stdlib only — no external dependencies
All new CLI commands follow existing graph-* naming pattern
Workflow integrations remain graceful (return enabled:false on failure)
Visualization must work without graphviz installed (Mermaid as default)
openQuestions: Context window optimization: should this be a new workflow function or modify existing enrich_context?
Test coverage mapping: how to distinguish test files from production files reliably?
API contract detection: should signature comparison be structural (AST-based) or string-based?
